name: Ceramic Pour-Over Set
description: Hand-thrown ceramic pour-over dripper with matching mug. Each piece is unique. Holds 400ml. Dishwasher safe.

name: Linen Tote Bag
description: Heavy-duty natural linen tote with reinforced handles. 15L capacity. Great for groceries, books, or the beach.

name: Beeswax Candle Trio
description: Set of three hand-poured beeswax candles in amber, eucalyptus, and cedar scents. Burns 40+ hours each.
